issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for Selenium tests.

scenarios.name: headless-pytest-login
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used time.sleep and skipped fixture teardown; treatment used WebDriverWait + EC.presence_of_element_located, --headless ChromeOptions, and a fixture that calls driver.quit().

scenarios.name: selenium-grid-compose
scenarios.rationale: Baseline defined hub + one chrome node and omitted SE_EVENT_BUS_PUBLISH_PORT/SUBSCRIBE_PORT; treatment included hub on 4442/4443/4444 plus chrome and firefox nodes with all three SE_EVENT_BUS_* env vars.
